architecture.uml:
left to right direction node Clock node "Alarm Controller" node "Radio Demodulator" node Speaker
Clock -- "Alarm Controller" --
"Alarm Controller" -- Speaker --
"Radio Demodulator" -- Speaker --
architecture.description: Simplified logical architecture for the receiver alarm clock.

interface.description: The clock provides timing information to the alarm controller.
interface.software: The interface SHALL communicate current time needed to compare against the configured alarm time.

interface.description: The alarm controller provides an alarm trigger to the speaker path.
interface.software: The interface SHALL communicate alarm activation to the audio output path when alarm conditions are met.

interface.description: The radio demodulator provides decoded audio to the speaker path.
interface.software: The interface SHALL communicate decoded radio audio from the radio demodulator to the speaker path.
